title: Irish Scone Biscuit Sandwich
description: A twist on traditional scones, sandwiched between flaky biscuit layers for a savory breakfast treat.
instructions: 2. Roll out biscuit dough to 1/4-inch thickness.
3. Cut out circles using a cookie cutter or glass.
4. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, prepare scone dough by mixing ingredients.
6. Roll out scone dough to 1/4-inch thickness.
7. Cut out circles using a cookie cutter or glass.
8. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes.
9. Assemble sandwiches by spreading butter on a biscuit, then topping with scone, cheese, and scallions.
10. Drizzle with heavy cream and serve.
